title: senecio provincialis var. corbariensis
intro: Senecio provincialis var. corbariensis, also known as the Pyrenean ragwort, is a variant of the Senecio provincialis plant, a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its hepatoprotective and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been utilized in traditional herbal medicine. The health benefits of Senecio provincialis var. corbariensis include its ability to protect the liver from damage, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. It is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and can also be found in various tinctures, infusions, and creams, although caution should be exercised due to potential toxicity at high doses.
